_comment: Narrative theme taxonomy for classifying supplier self-positioning. Used by Agent 2 Skill 1 (Market Voice Signals) to map how a supplier talks about themselves against a consistent vocabulary. Open — suppliers may push themes not on this list. These are the expected ones.

themes.name: Operational Excellence
themes.description: Efficiency, reliability, continuous improvement, lean operations, service quality, SLA performance. The 'we run things well' message.

themes.name: Digital Transformation
themes.description: Modernisation, digital-first, cloud migration, legacy replacement, user-centred design, GDS alignment. The 'we make things modern' message.

themes.name: AI & Intelligent Automation
themes.description: Artificial intelligence, machine learning, RPA, intelligent document processing, predictive analytics, data-driven decision making. The 'we're leading on AI' message.

themes.name: Resilience & Business Continuity
themes.description: Operational resilience, disaster recovery, supply chain resilience, cyber resilience, pandemic response capability. The 'we keep things running when they break' message.

themes.name: Citizen & Patient Outcomes
themes.description: Outcome-focused delivery, citizen experience, patient outcomes, service user satisfaction, public value. The 'we deliver results for people' message.

themes.name: Social Value
themes.description: Community investment, local employment, apprenticeships, STEM programmes, veterans hiring, SME supply chain, voluntary sector partnerships. The 'we give back' message.

themes.name: Partnership & Ecosystem
themes.description: Alliance strategy, hyperscaler partnerships, SME ecosystem, joint ventures, teaming, collaborative delivery. The 'we work with the best' message.

themes.name: Sustainability & Net Zero
themes.description: Carbon reduction, net-zero targets, environmental management, circular economy, Scope 1/2/3 reporting. The 'we're going green' message.

themes.name: Innovation
themes.description: R&D investment, innovation labs, proof of concepts, technology incubation, creative problem solving. The 'we invent new things' message. Distinct from digital transformation (which is about modernising) and AI (which is a specific technology).

themes.name: Sector Depth & Domain Expertise
themes.description: Deep domain knowledge, sector specialisation, regulatory understanding, subject matter expertise. The 'we understand your world' message.

themes.name: People & Talent
themes.description: Workforce quality, retention, training investment, employer brand, diversity, wellbeing, professional development. The 'our people are our strength' message.

themes.name: Global Scale & Reach
themes.description: International presence, multi-country delivery, offshore/nearshore capability, global best practice transfer. The 'we operate at scale worldwide' message.
